contentList.content: Your <LSTag Tooltip="ProficiencyBonus">Proficiency Bonus</LSTag> is added to your Initiative rolls, and you can't be <LSTag Type="Status" Tooltip="SURPRISED">Surprised</LSTag>.

Your <LSTag Tooltip="MovementSpeed">movement speed</LSTag> increases by [1], and your jump distance by [2]. Once per turn, you can <LSTag Type="Spell" Tooltip="Projectile_Jump">Jump</LSTag> without using a <LSTag Type="ActionResource" Tooltip="BonusActionPoint">bonus action</LSTag>.
You can <LSTag Type="Spell" Tooltip="Projectile_Jump">Jump</LSTag> without using a <LSTag Type="ActionResource" Tooltip="BonusActionPoint">bonus action</LSTag>.
When a creature misses you with a melee attack, you can retaliate with your own strike if you are wielding a melee weapon.

Your <LSTag Tooltip="MovementSpeed">movement speed</LSTag> increases by [1], and your jump distance by [2]. Once per turn, you can <LSTag Type="Spell" Tooltip="Projectile_Jump">Jump</LSTag> without using a <LSTag Type="ActionResource" Tooltip="BonusActionPoint">bonus action</LSTag>.
You have become an expert at navigating hazards. <LSTag Type="Status" Tooltip="DIFFICULT_TERRAIN">Difficult Terrain</LSTag> no longer slows you down, and you can't slip on grease or ice.

Your <LSTag Tooltip="MovementSpeed">movement speed</LSTag> increases by [1], and your jump distance by [2]. Once per turn, you can <LSTag Type="Spell" Tooltip="Projectile_Jump">Jump</LSTag> without using a <LSTag Type="ActionResource" Tooltip="BonusActionPoint">bonus action</LSTag>.
